zh.Shenton, Hinckley and Bosworth, Leiceste: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton於1480年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利。他於1504年與Sarah Chesters在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Shenton, Hinckley and Bosworth, Leiceste: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton于1480年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利。他于1504年与Sarah Chesters在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Shenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sheinton (Shropshire), Shenton (Leicestershire), or Shavington (Cheshire), recorded as Shenton in 1514. The Shropshire placename probably derives from Old English scēne ‘bright, beautiful’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or perhaps from an Old English personal name Scēna + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Leicestershire place takes its name from the river Sence, itself from Old English scenc ‘drink, draught’, + Old English tūn, while the Cheshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Scēafa + Old English connective -ing- + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton was born in 1480, in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He married Sarah Chesters in 1504, in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton est né en 1480, à Hinckley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Sarah Chesters en 1504, à Hinckley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton wurde 1480 in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1504 in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Sarah Chesters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton è nato il nel 1480 nel Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Sarah Chesters nel 1504, nel Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Shenton, Hinckley and Bosworth, Leiceste: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Shentonは1480年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリーで生まれた。1504年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリーでSarah Chestersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton(은)는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에서 태어났다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에서 Sarah Chesters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Shenton, Hinckley and Bosworth, Leiceste: Hinckley, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton nasceu em 1480, em Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Sarah Chesters em 1504, em Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton родился в 1480 г. в местности хинккли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Chesters в 1504 г. в местности хинккли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton nació en 1480, en Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sarah Chesters en 1504, en Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
